name: user_sessions
description: Show logged-in users, their sessions, and login history
command: echo '=== Current Sessions ===' && who -a 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '=== Recent Logins ===' && last -10 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '=== Failed Logins ===' && lastb -5 2>/dev/null || echo 'lastb requires root'
